channel.title: Hello my name is nzia on nwxxb
channel.description: Recent content in Hello my name is nzia on nwxxb

item.title: Might be FAQ
item.description:
1. What is this?

Hey, welcome to my blog. Maybe I can just directly explain to you some sections in this blog: Basically, this blog currently (might get updated later in the future) consists of two sections: Projects and Posts.

Some projects might have different “shapes”: 1) sometimes you can see a single page post (just like what posts contain). Or, sometimes it can also contain a bunch of small notes. My biggest reason to create those shapes is to add flexibility and to eliminate my excuses to over-complicate my writing.

item.title: Solve low-hanging fruit problem
item.description:
Before I deploy this app, I have to fix some “obvious” problems, and before doing that, I set up some scripts to fetch some nice graphs (so we can see the improvement):

  • a simple bash loop that calls docker stat and stores its stdout to a file
  • a ruby script that parses docker stats from point number 1, along with data from the log file (I use lograge to get nicely JSON-formatted lines) and parses it with vega-lite
  • I also initiated a k6 script that covers almost all important endpoints, so we can get the data that we want to graph.

These are two graphs that I generated that show median, p75, and p100 of memory allocation and duration on each endpoint. Each bar has its own color for versions and changes:

item.title: this.blog
item.description: this blog is generated using hugo

item.title: Solodo
item.description: Static and simple to-do list app. All data saved in the browser’s local storage. Created using React.js

item.title: Pengalaman beberapa bulan menggunakan VIM
item.description: Dulu, saya adalah pengguna VSCode dan sangat bergantung pada GUI, dan saya sudah merasa cukup puas dengan beberapa plugin dan sering menggunakan mouse tanpa memedulikan shortcut. Sampai suatu saat karena project yang dikerjakan semakin besar dan melibatkan banyak teknologi saya terpaksa untuk memilih dua pilihan: 1. mencari text editor yang lebih ringan dan 2. mencari laptop yang lebih mumpuni. dan tentu sebagai mahasiswa yang belum memiliki penghasilan tetap saya memilih pilihan pertama. Tentu alasan ini mungkin tidak selaras dengan stigma atau ekspektasi yang terpaut pada pengguna vim pada umumnya: dapat menulis kode lebih cepat karena meniadakan penggunaan mouse. Ketika saya ditanya kenapa saya menggunakan vim justru saya akan menjawab: karena laptop saya bukan macbook yang cukup mumpuni untuk membuka VSCode dan banyak aplikasi secara bersamaan.
